zh.lifeSummary: 當John De Sudeley於1115年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾托丁頓時，他的父親Harold de Sudeley59歲，母親Maud d'Chester44歲。他於1130年與Grace de Tracy在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾托丁頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1140年在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾素德勒享年25歲。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Sudeley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Sudeley (Gloucs) or Soudley in East Dean (Gloucs).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

en.lifeSummary: When John De Sudeley was born in 1115, in Toddington, Gloucestershire, England, his father, Harold de Sudeley, was 59 and his mother, Maud d'Chester, was 44. He married Grace de Tracy in 1130, in Toddington, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1140, in Sudeley, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 25.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John De Sudeley est né en 1115, à Toddington, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, Harold de Sudeley, avait 59 ans et sa mère, Maud d'Chester, avait 44 ans. Il a épousé Grace de Tracy en 1130, à Toddington, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1140, à Sudeley, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 25 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John De Sudeley 1115 in Toddington, Gloucestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Harold de Sudeley 59 und seine Mutter Maud d'Chester 44. Er hat 1130 in Toddington, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom Grace de Tracy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1140 im Alter von 25 Jahren in Sudeley, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John De Sudeley è nato il nel 1115 nel Toddington, Gloucestershire, England, il suo padre, Harold de Sudeley, aveva 59 anni e il suo madre, Maud d'Chester, aveva 44 anni. Lui sposato Grace de Tracy nel 1130, nel Toddington, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1140, nel Sudeley, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 25 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: John De Sudeley(이)가 1115년 영국 그루스스터실르 토딩턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Harold de Sudeley(은)는 59세였고, 그의 어머니 Maud d'Chester(은)는 44세였다. 그는 1130년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 토딩턴에서 Grace de Tracy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1140년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 수데리에서 25세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John De Sudeley родился в 1115 г. в местности тоддингтон, глоусестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Harold de Sudeley было 59 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud d'Chester, 44. Он женился на женщине по имени Grace de Tracy в 1130 г. в местности тоддингтон, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1140 г. в местности судели, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 25 лет.
